reference: I am sorry for your loss. It is likely that if bacteria were found in the placenta, it was the cause of the miscarriage. Any infection could potentially lead to this outcome. The placenta normally should not have any bacteria present. Proteus mirabilis can also cause a very severe infection and is often the cause of urinary tract infections. I hope this answers your question.
text: I am sorry for your loss. It is likely that the bacteria were found in the placenta. It was the cause of the miscarriage. Any infection could potentially lead to this outcome. The placenta normally should not have any bacteria present. Urgeus marabilis can also cause a very severe infection and is often the cause of urinary tract infections. I hope this answers your question.
